headline: Manaka Matsukubo
body: 🚨 Chelsea sign Manaka Matsukubo from North Carolina Courage on a five-year deal. 21-year-old was named the NWSL Midfielder of the Year last season. She scored 11 goals last season and already has five in nine games this campaign.🇯🇵 🗣️ Matsukubo: I’m so excited to be joining Chelsea, a club with a lot of history. As a small child, I followed Chelsea because it is a club everyone in the world knows about. The club has a strong history of winning trophies and has done so well at the top of the game, so I couldn’t pass up this opportunity.
raw_text:
🚨 Chelsea sign Manaka Matsukubo from North Carolina Courage on a five-year deal. 21-year-old  was named the NWSL Midfielder of the Year last season. She scored 11 goals last season and already has five in nine games this campaign.🇯🇵

🗣️ Matsukubo: "I’m so excited to be joining Chelsea, a club with a lot of history. As a small child, I followed Chelsea because it is a club everyone in the world knows about. The club has a strong history of winning trophies and has done so well at the top of the game, so I couldn’t pass up this opportunity."
